articles.title: REDDIT IN AI CONTENT LICENSING DEAL WITH GOOGLE
articles.summary: Reddit's recent $60 million annual deal with Google will provide content for the tech giant's AI models by leveraging the social media site's vast repository of niche discussion groups. Reddit is positioning itself to capitalize on the growing demand for quality data in the AI industry. For Google, the deal represents a potential 'data' moat in the competitive AI space.

articles.title: GOOGLE ANNOUNCES PERFORMANCE MAX UPDATES – INCLUDING GEMINI INTEGRATION
articles.summary: Google's latest updates to Performance Max include global expansion of asset generation and image editing, along with the integration of Imagen 2 for creating lifestyle imagery showing people in action. Ad Strength metrics are evolving to emphasize both quantity and quality of assets, offering advertisers insights into maximizing campaign performance across Google's ad inventory.

articles.title: TREECARD’S 1,027% SURGE WITH TIKTOK SPARK NATIVE ADS
articles.summary: TikTok Spark Ads are a native ad format that allows brands to use organic posts as advertisements. Treecard, a free app that plants trees, split its Spark creatives between two campaigns: one for testing and one for the best performers. Its team leveraged TikTok’s Video Insights to decipher which words, actions, images, and sounds were boosting the app’s installations and fed its findings back to creators to produce new content. This resulted in app installs skyrocketing by 1,027% and spend per app install decreasing by 63%.

articles.title: TEMPLATE FOR A CLEAR HOMEPAGE
articles.summary: A breakdown of eWebinar’s homepage overhaul. The hero highlights the key product capabilities. Below contains the ‘problem section’, which lays out the exact problem the product solves. The ‘solution intro’ positions the product as the painkiller to the problem stated above. The last section should include the top 3 value propositions that show how to solve the problem above. Ideally, this section also serves as a product demo.

articles.title: HOW TO DO CONVERSION FUNNEL ANALYSIS LIKE A PRO
articles.summary: Mastering the art of conversion funnel analysis can help marketers pinpoint where potential customers drop off, capitalize on successful channels, and empower teams with actionable insights. This article covers the importance of conversion funnel analysis, the stages of the funnel, and practical tips for improvement. It provides real-world examples across industries and introduces key metrics and advanced tools for effective analysis.

articles.title: SUBSTACK NOW LETS WRITERS CURATE A ‘NETWORK’ OF RECOMMENDED PUBLICATIONS FOR THEIR SUBSCRIBERS
articles.summary: Substack is introducing a new peer-to-peer recommendation system. It is allowing writers to curate and share lists of publications for their readers to subscribe to. This shift aims to move away from centralized discovery and empower writers to expand their reach while fostering a sense of community. The system allows users to opt into recommended networks and access content from multiple writers, potentially increasing engagement and subscriptions.

articles.title: FROM FLAGSHIP BACK TO FLEDGLING: STRIPE’S LESSONS ON GOING MULTI-PRODUCT
articles.summary: This article contains 9 lessons from an early Stripe PM on expanding from single- to multi-product. First, identify the buyer of the new product line and determine how closely they align with your existing product’s customers. When building the new product line, leaders should treat it like a business unit, with its own salespeople, targets, and marketing motion. Go in expecting the customer to convince you during customer discovery — not the other way around. More lessons and anecdotes are included in the article.

articles.title: THE FLYWHEEL THAT’S GETTING KEVIN INDIG CLOSE TO HIS $1M/YR GOAL
articles.summary: Kevin Indig, known for his newsletter Growth Memo, shares tactics for indie hackers. He emphasizes the importance of community engagement and ambassadorship, encouraging individuals to identify influential figures in their industry and provide them with value to promote their products. He also suggests building referral loops into products to facilitate organic growth and advocates for systematically testing various strategies and hypotheses to stand out in competitive markets.

articles.title: INSIDE THE WASHINGTON POST TIKTOK MULTIVERSE
articles.summary: This article explores the crucial role of news organizations on short-form video platforms like TikTok through an interview with the Senior Video Producer at The Washington Post. It highlights the significance of delivering informative content where audiences actively engage, citing instances where such platforms provide potentially life-saving information amidst crises like dangerous storms.

articles.title: RANKING CONTENT ON SIGNALS OTHER THAN USER ENGAGEMENT
articles.summary: Social media platforms should rank content based on prosocial outcomes rather than merely user engagement.

articles.title: ALMOST HALF OF ADULTS ON TIKTOK HAVE NEVER POSTED A VIDEO
articles.summary: 48% of TikTok users have never posted a video, reflecting a trend of passive consumption over active content creation on social media platforms.

articles.title: 55% OF MARKETERS ARE POSITIVE ABOUT GOOGLE SGE
articles.summary: A reminder for Digital marketers striving to understand and adapt to the implications of SGE on SEO strategies and search outcomes - preparedness and confidence are essential when navigating an evolving landscape.
